author: FS-GG
name: FS.GG Governance overlay
description: Drops the populated FS.GG.Governance reference gate set (.fsgg/governance.yml, policy.yml, capabilities.yml, tooling.yml) into an existing SDD-managed project to activate Governance. Ships the build + test + evidence gates, non-blocking by default (light).

appName.description: Project/solution name used in the governed command strings (e.g. 'dotnet build <App>.slnx') and the governance project id.

defaultProfile.description: Default Governance profile. 'light' is the deliberate non-blocking inner-loop posture; switch to 'strict'/'release' to make the block-on-ship gates block at Verify.

choices.description: Tightens the blocking floor to Verify.
